mapper.select: SELECT c.chunk_id AS chunkId, c.doc_id AS docId, c.kb_id AS kbId, d.title AS docTitle, c.content AS content, MATCH(c.content) AGAINST(#{query} IN NATURAL LANGUAGE MODE) AS score FROM ai_knowledge_chunk c INNER JOIN ai_knowledge_document d ON c.doc_id = d.doc_id AND c.doc_version = d.doc_version AND d.del_flag = '0' AND d.status = '0' AND d.index_status = 'DONE' INNER JOIN ai_knowledge_base b ON c.kb_id = b.kb_id AND b.del_flag = '0' AND b.status = '0' WHERE MATCH(c.content) AGAINST(#{query} IN NATURAL LANGUAGE MODE) ORDER BY score DESC LIMIT #{topK}

SELECT c.chunk_id AS chunkId, c.doc_id AS docId, c.kb_id AS kbId, d.title AS docTitle, c.content AS content, 1 AS score FROM ai_knowledge_chunk c INNER JOIN ai_knowledge_document d ON c.doc_id = d.doc_id AND c.doc_version = d.doc_version AND d.del_flag = '0' AND d.status = '0' AND d.index_status = 'DONE' INNER JOIN ai_knowledge_base b ON c.kb_id = b.kb_id AND b.del_flag = '0' AND b.status = '0' WHERE c.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY c.chunk_id DESC LIMIT #{topK}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ai_knowledge_chunk (doc_id, kb_id, chunk_index, content, page_num, section_title, doc_version, embedding_json, create_time) VALUES
(#{item.docId}, #{item.kbId}, #{item.chunkIndex}, #{item.content}, #{item.pageNum}, #{item.sectionTitle}, #{item.docVersion}, #{item.embeddingJson}, #{item.createTime})
